name: 3Play Media
description: 3Play Media — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: 3Play Media — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: 3Play Media: 3Play Media — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Caption sync for developer conference talk recordings
ADA-compliant video transcripts for product demos
WCAG 2.1 AA caption delivery for e-learning courses
Multi-language subtitle export for global dev docs

pros: Enterprise-grade captioning, transcription and audio description
Strong workflow tools for large video libraries
Integrations with major video platforms and LMSs
cons: Media-focused, not a web a11y testing tool as described
Pricing is enterprise-heavy for small teams
Turnaround times vary with service tier
Overkill if you only need auto-captions
review.verdict: Top-tier media accessibility vendor for video-heavy orgs, but miscategorized as a web a11y testing tool.
review.best_for: Enterprises and universities with large video libraries needing compliant captions.
review.not_for: Dev teams looking for automated a11y scanning of web apps.
